title: IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Technical Superintendent, Administrative Assistant Posts
org: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa) Technical Superintendent Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Goa Technical Superintendent Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Technical Superintendent, Administrative Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa) Technical Superintendent Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Goa Technical Superintendent Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max age 34 for Technical Superintendent, 27 for Administrative Assistant. Relaxation as per rules.
age_limit.details: Maximum age for Technical Superintendent is 34 years. Maximum age for Administrative Assistant is 27 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be as per Government of India norms. PwBD candidates can have a maximum age of 56 years. Ex-servicemen will be granted age relaxation as per rules. IIT Goa regular employees can apply up to a maximum age of 57 years. IIT Goa non-regular/contract employees with 5 or more years of service can apply up to a maximum age of 57 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree (55% marks), Diploma in Electrical/Electronics & Communication/CSE/IT/ECE (60% marks), B.Tech/B.E. in relevant fields (60% marks)
qualification.details: Technical Superintendent (Electrical): 3-year Diploma in Electrical / Electronics & Communication Engineering + 60% marks + 6 years post-diploma experience OR B.Tech / B.E. in Electrical / Electronics & Communication Engineering + 60% marks + 3 years post-degree experience. Full-time M.Tech/M.E. duration (normal period) counted towards experience (max 2 years). Technical Superintendent: 3-year Diploma in CSE / ECE / IT or equivalent + 60% marks + 6 years post-diploma experience OR Bachelor’s degree (non B.Tech/B.E.) in CSE / ECE / IT or equivalent + 60% marks + 5 years experience OR B.Tech / B.E. in CSE / ECE / IT or equivalent + 60% marks + 3 years experience. Full-time Master’s duration counted towards experience (max 2 years). Administrative Assistant: Bachelor’s degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 4 & 6 of 7th CPC Pay Matrix
salary_details.details: Technical Superintendent (Electrical): Pay Level 6 (7th CPC) Technical Superintendent: Pay Level 6 (7th CPC) Administrative Assistant: Pay Level 4 (7th CPC)

selection_process: Written Test Computer Based Test Trade Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Goa Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Goa to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Goa Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 is 29th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Technical Superintendent post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Technical Superintendent and Administrative Assistant posts in IIT Goa Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Administrative Assistant post is a Bachelor’s degree with at least 55% marks or an equivalent CGPA.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates are required to pay Rs. 300/- for Group B posts and Rs. 200/- for Group C posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Technical Superintendent post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical Superintendent post is 34 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IIT Goa Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 includes a Written Test, Computer Based Test, and Trade Test.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Goa apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment is open to eligible candidates from all regions, provided they meet the specified educational and age criteria.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Technical Superintendent post?
faq.answer: The Technical Superintendent posts are offered with a salary in Pay Level 6 of the 7th CPC Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for IIT Goa Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article or via the official IIT Goa website.

faq.question: Q10. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 is entirely online through the official website.
